## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (`website/src/content/docs/` or README)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` updated
- [ ] `uv run ruff check`, `uv run ruff format`, `uv run mypy src/theodosia`, `uv run pytest` all green locally
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By: Claude` or "Generated with Claude Code" trailers in commits
- [ ] No em dashes in authored prose (CLAUDE.md house rule)
